mapper.select: SELECT FOLDER_ID, MEMBER_ID, FOLDER_NAME, DESCRIPTION, DISPLAY_ORDER, IS_DEFAULT, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TB_FOLDER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, FOLDER_ID ASC

SELECT FOLDER_ID, MEMBER_ID, FOLDER_NAME, DESCRIPTION, DISPLAY_ORDER, IS_DEFAULT, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TB_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'

SELECT FOLDER_ID, MEMBER_ID, FOLDER_NAME, DESCRIPTION, DISPLAY_ORDER, IS_DEFAULT, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TB_FOLDER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_DEFAULT = 'Y' AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY FOLDER_ID ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_FOLDER ( MEMBER_ID, FOLDER_NAME, DESCRIPTION, DISPLAY_ORDER, IS_DEFAULT, IS_ACTIVE ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{folderName}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{displayOrder}, #{isDefault}, #{isActive} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_FOLDER
FOLDER_NAME = #{folderName}, DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
UPDATE TB_FOLDER SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
UPDATE TB_SENTENCE_SET SET FOLDER_ID = NULL, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
